title: John Ale
compiled_truth: John Ale is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-12 to 2001-11-27), John Ale sent 10 and received 64 emails, totalling 74 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rod Hayslett](people/rod-hayslett) (8), [Michael Anderson](people/michael-anderson) (4), [Diana Jebousek](people/diana-jebousek) (2), [James Derrick](people/james-derrick) (2), [Julia Murray](people/julia-murray) (1).
